title: DragN's Crop Overhaul!
description: An overhaul for crops and food!
body:
**DragN’s Crop Overhaul!**

Crop Overhaul is part of the O-Suite of DragN’s mods. It remasters and adds to the list of crops for a more fun and fulfilling farming experience, allowing you to make more food you love without being too much of a burden.

**New Features Include:**

- A built-in **Guidebook** for help with finding certain crops and using different mechanics 
- **Wild crops** that spawn in different biomes in the world, allowing you to start farming sooner without needing to find a village.
- **Right-click** crop harvesting
- **More varieties** of vanilla crops 
- Some **recolored and/ or retextured** vanilla crops and foods to fit in better and to look more appealing
- **Brand new crops** to make more types of foods
- **New fruit trees**
- **A new “flour” system**, wherein the player places down their grain crop and hits it with a Flail to get Grain. The grain can then be turned into Flour to make all sorts of new pastries or bread. 
- **Canning, Jarring,** and **Fermenting** to make different kinds of foods. 
- **Placeable foods**, such as jam jars, apple baskets, bread, and more

**Built-in compatibility with:**
- Livestock Overhaul
- Jade
- Serene Seasons
- Legendary Survival Overhaul
- Spoiled

This mod also makes the base _Livestock Overhaul_ food compatible with the _Spoiled_ mod.

Can be used alongside Pam’s Harvestcraft & Farmer’s Delight!

**Discord:** https://discord.gg/2WznNTtVac

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
